# [Clang] Clang crashes when compiling nested lambdas with default parameter capture since `18.1.0`

**Author:** Xniao
**URL:** https://github.com/llvm/llvm-project/issues/151813
**Status:** Closed
**Labels:** clang:frontend, confirmed, crash, lambda, generated by fuzzer, regression:18
**Closed Date:** 2025-12-10T21:29:34Z

## Body

Repro: https://godbolt.org/z/3xEoKeEM5
- clang start crashing on 18.1.0
- generated by fuzzer

The compiler exhibits two different crash patterns:
1. Exit code 70 (Sometimes)
2. Exit code 139

## Program
```cpp
#include <functional>
#include <string>

template <typename T> T tmain() {
  int i = 0;
  auto shutdown_hook = [i](int val = i) {
    struct LazyClass {
      std::function<void()> lambda;
      LazyClass()
          : lambda([val]() {
              std::string msg = "Shutdown hook executed with value: " + std::to_string(val);
            }) {}
    };
    LazyClass instance;
  };

  return T();
}

int main() { return tmain<int>(); }
```

## Stack Dump
1. Exit code 70
```bash
<source>:6:38: error: default argument references local variable 'i' of enclosing function
    6 |   auto shutdown_hook = [i](int val = i) {
      |                                      ^
fatal error: error in backend: SmallVector unable to grow. Requested capacity (4294967296) is larger than maximum value for size type (4294967295)
PLEASE submit a bug report to https://github.com/llvm/llvm-project/issues/ and include the crash backtrace, preprocessed source, and associated run script.
```


## Comments

### Comment 1 - llvmbot


@llvm/issue-subscribers-clang-frontend

Author: Jireh Guo (Xniao)

<details>
Repro: https://godbolt.org/z/3xEoKeEM5
- clang start crashing on 18.1.0
- generated by fuzzer

The compiler exhibits two different crash patterns:
1. Exit code 70 (Sometimes)
2. Exit code 139

## Program
```cpp
#include &lt;functional&gt;
#include &lt;string&gt;

template &lt;typename T&gt; T tmain() {
  int i = 0;
  auto shutdown_hook = [i](int val = i) {
    struct LazyClass {
      std::function&lt;void()&gt; lambda;
      LazyClass()
          : lambda([val]() {
              std::string msg = "Shutdown hook executed with value: " + std::to_string(val);
            }) {}
    };
    LazyClass instance;
  };

  return T();
}

int main() { return tmain&lt;int&gt;(); }
```

## Stack Dump
1. Exit code 70
